description_long: This is a wooden baseball bat with a dark, weathered finish and a slightly tapered handle leading to a rounded knob at the end. The barrel of the bat is embedded with several large, protruding metal nails, giving it a rugged and menacing appearance. The wood surface shows signs of wear, scratches, and discoloration, suggesting heavy use or intentional distressing. The nails are irregularly spaced and stick out at various angles, especially concentrated near the thicker end of the bat. There are no visible brand logos, grip tape, or decorative markings on the handle or barrel. The overall look is utilitarian and intimidating, suitable for both sports and improvised defensive scenarios in an urban environment.
description: A weathered wooden baseball bat with protruding metal nails embedded in the barrel, giving it a rugged and intimidating appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bat, with nails clearly visible near the barrel end and a worn wooden surface.
description_view_1: End-on view of the barrel, highlighting the circular end and the protruding nails around the circumference.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the full length and the cluster of nails at the barrel, with the handle and knob visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view along the length of the bat, emphasizing the concentration of nails at the barrel and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is a simple rounded wooden knob, matching the rest of the bat in color and texture, with no distinct markings or logos.
